text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Rickey! Lucky! Extra happy! ☆ It's Copano Rickey
here to make your day brighter!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm on a mission to prove the power of feng shui
through races, and inspire people to adopt it into
their lifestyles! Then everyone'll be extra super
fortunate!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
For starters, let's brush up your office's layout.
This is gonna be our home base, so we wanna get
the good energy flowing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with <chrname>!
